meta.title: Careers
meta.description: Build a career in Canadian architectural millwork at Sandha Woodworks.

hero.title: Build a career in Canadian architectural millwork.
hero.description: We're growing our shop, office, and install teams. If you take pride in your craft and want long-term work with a supportive team, we'd love to meet you.

president.name: Chamkaur Sandha
president.photoAlt: Chamkaur Sandha, President of Sandha Woodworks
president.title: Join a team that takes pride in every project.
president.p1: At Sandha Woodworks, we believe exceptional millwork begins with a commitment to quality and a deep understanding of our clients' vision. From concept to completion, our team brings precision, craftsmanship, and dedication to every project.
president.p2: We're proud to serve commercial, institutional, and retail partners across North America with solutions that stand the test of time — and we're always looking for skilled tradespeople and office team members who share those values.

culture.label: Our Culture
culture.title: Skilled work, respected people, long-term careers.

competitivePay.title: Competitive Pay
competitivePay.description: Trade wages that reflect experience and skill.

modernEquipment.title: Modern Equipment
modernEquipment.description: Multi-axis CNC, dedicated finishing, engineered workflow.

teamEnvironment.title: Team Environment
teamEnvironment.description: A supportive shop floor and office.

positions.label: Open Positions
positions.title: We're currently hiring.
positions.description: Submit your application below if you're ready to help build high-quality architectural millwork for clients across Canada.

project-manager.title: Project Manager — Millwork
project-manager.description: Lead architectural millwork projects from award through installation — coordinating engineering, production, subcontractors, and site teams to deliver on scope, budget, and schedule.

microvellum-engineer.title: Microvellum Engineer / Millwork CAD Specialist
microvellum-engineer.description: Engineer architectural millwork in Microvellum — from shop drawings to CNC-ready output — for high-end commercial, institutional, and retail projects.

cabinet-maker.title: Cabinet Maker
cabinet-maker.description: Build high-end architectural cabinetry and casework in our Brantford shop, working from Microvellum shop drawings and CNC-cut components.

carpenter.title: Carpenter
carpenter.meta: Full-time · Permanent · Brantford, ON (with travel to job sites)
carpenter.description: Install architectural millwork and casework on commercial, institutional, and retail sites across Ontario.

senior-wood-finisher.title: Senior Wood Finisher / Spray Booth Specialist
senior-wood-finisher.description: Apply high-end wood finishes and coatings in a dedicated spray booth environment for architectural millwork, custom cabinetry, and commercial casework.

cta.title: Interested in joining our team?
cta.description: Send us your background and experience through the application form above.

form.title: Candidate application
form.intro: Share your background and upload your resume. Required fields are marked with an asterisk.

placeholders.coverNote: Tell us a little about yourself and why you'd like to join Sandha Woodworks.

upload.resumeHint: PDF, DOC, or DOCX up to 10 MB

form.consent: By submitting this form, you consent to our team reviewing your application. We will be in touch if your experience aligns with an opening.

success.title: Application received
success.body: Thank you for applying. Our team will review your details and reach out if your profile is a match for an opening.

errors.currentRoleRequired: Current or most recent role is required
errors.resumeType: Resume must be a PDF, DOC or DOCX
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
